prompt: A drone surveys crop zones while a rover collects soil samples. Every zone must be inspected at least once. The rover begins sampling only after the drone finishes the zone. If communication is lost, both must halt.
constraints: Rover samples only after drone finishes scanning zone
AgriDrone and SoilRover halt if communication lost

{
  "query": "A<> (AgriDrone.inspects_all_zones)",

  }
